case_title: FRANCIS P LUKESH VS. DIANE E GEORGE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF FRANCIS P. LUKESH & DEFENDANT DIANE E. GEORGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUKESH, FRANCIS P IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEORGE, DIANE E STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
